meaning: n.军团,兵队,团,兵种,技术兵种,特殊兵种,(德国大学的)学生联合会
examples: She served in the medical corps.
David McNeil is travelling with the White House press corps.
Henceforth all branches of the naval officer corps were equal to one another.
He came to America 45 years ago and enlisted in the US Marine Corps.
She began volunteering at the Service Corps of Retired Executives (SCORE), a free business counseling and advice service.
